response.global_analysis: 1. Reference Match: Spoken Japanese talk is transcribed manually and translated accurately. 2. Reference Usage: Since the background music during the credits (02:57 to 04:30) is purely instrumental, no music subtitles are generated for that segment per the Golden Rule. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to Choco-sensei's speech onset and offset, ensuring accurate alignment and natural phrasing.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、みんなどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: Yes! So, everyone, how was it?

subtitles.original: 今回の新曲「キミの秒針」は、
subtitles.english: This time's new song, "Kimi no Byoushin,"

subtitles.original: シドのマオ様が作詞、
subtitles.english: had its lyrics written by Mao-sama of SID,

subtitles.original: そして御恵明希様が作曲、編曲、
subtitles.english: and music composed and arranged by Aki-sama of SID.

subtitles.original: そして編曲にはなんと、加藤貴之様も加わっていただきました！
subtitles.english: And for the arrangement, Takayuki Kato-sama also joined us!

subtitles.original: いや、今回は、
subtitles.english: Wow, this time,

subtitles.original: ボイスドラマ連動企画の第1弾として、
subtitles.english: as the first part of the voice drama collaboration project,

subtitles.original: ストーリー全体のね、テーマソングを担うような、ハイクオリティの楽曲に仕上がっております！
subtitles.english: it has turned out to be a high-quality song that serves as the theme song for the entire story!

subtitles.original: ま、ドラマの鍵となるね、「秒針」というメタファーにも要注目してください！
subtitles.english: Please also pay attention to the metaphor of the "second hand," which is key to the drama!

subtitles.original: シドさんだけではなく、この後のね、豪華アーティストの皆様にもたくさん書いていただいたので、
subtitles.english: Not only SID, but many other gorgeous artists have also written songs for us after this,

subtitles.original: 皆様、リリースをお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: so please look forward to the releases!

subtitles.original: こちらの「キミの秒針」は、各音楽サイトはちょっと間が空いちゃうんだけど、
subtitles.english: As for "Kimi no Byoushin," although there will be a bit of a gap on music streaming sites,

subtitles.original: 3月15日の0時から配信予定でございます！
subtitles.english: it is scheduled to be distributed starting from midnight on March 15th!

subtitles.original: ま、ちょっとね、公開まで時間があるから、それまでこの配信、何度も見返してみてください！聴き込んでね！
subtitles.english: Well, since there's some time until the release, please watch this stream over and over! Listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: そして、 Marshallー、MVもね、ちょっと後日公開なので、楽しみにしていてください！
subtitles.english: And, and! The MV will also be released at a later date, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、今日のチョコの生誕ライブはどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: And with that, how was Choco's birthday live today?

subtitles.original: ま、この後はすぐに、
subtitles.english: Well, right after this,

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、冒頭、最初の方でお披露目した、ノエルちゃんとラミィちゃんとの3人の「初恋大戦争」のMV公開があって、
subtitles.english: we'll have the release of the MV for "Hatsukoi Daisensou" by the three of us with Noel-chan and Lamy-chan, which we showed at the beginning,

subtitles.original: その後、メン限で、ちょっとライブと、撮影会の続きとか、
subtitles.english: and after that, in the members-only stream, we'll do a mini-live, continue the photo session,Convert the provided video translation files into high-quality, audio-synchronized English subtitles using your advanced multimodal capabilities. Ensure exact alignment between spoken dialogue and subtitle timestamps.

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、メン限でしか見れないシチュエーションドラマとかやるので、
subtitles.english: and do a situation drama that you can only see in the members-only stream!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ、気になる人は見に来てください！
subtitles.english: So please, those who are interested, come and watch!

subtitles.original: それでは、また後でお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's meet again later!

subtitles.original: お疲れーと！はーむっ。
subtitles.english: Otsukare-to! *chu*
